THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE AND HEREBY IS ENTERD IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER AND THE AWARD IN THE FINRA EXPUNGMENT ARBITRATION IS CONFIRMED IN IT'S ENTIRETY. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT GRANTING PETITION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)
